schema.title: Response Users Get Me Recommended Subjects

post.description:
Dry-run the credential against its provider with a 1-token call.
Never returns the plaintext key in errors.

schema.title: Response Health Ready Health Ready Get

ChatSendResponse.title: ChatSendResponse
ChatSendResponse.description: The persisted user turn plus the grounded assistant reply.

CredentialResponse.title: CredentialResponse
CredentialResponse.description: Response schema — *never* includes the plaintext key.

GenerateResponse.title: GenerateResponse
GenerateResponse.description:
Returned immediately when generation is queued — the QuestionSet is in
`generating` status. Poll `GET /question-sets/{id}` (or the upload detail)
for completion.

GenerationDefaultsResponse.title: GenerationDefaultsResponse
GenerationDefaultsResponse.description:
What *would* run for this upload, plus (admins only) the selectable
active extraction models and profiles for a per-run override.

QuestionRegenerateRequest.title: QuestionRegenerateRequest
QuestionRegenerateRequest.description:
Optional RAG context window for regeneration.

When `chunk_ids` is provided, the AI re-prompt is grounded in the text of
those chunks (typically the top-N rerank winners from a preview call).
Empty / omitted → falls back to the original `source_excerpt`.

QuestionSetReplayRequest.title: QuestionSetReplayRequest
QuestionSetReplayRequest.description: Override any control input for a re-run; omit to inherit the original.

QuizChoiceResponse.title: QuizChoiceResponse
QuizChoiceResponse.description: Choice without is_correct — server hides the answer until /answer is called.

QuizQuestionResult.title: QuizQuestionResult
QuizQuestionResult.description: Per-question breakdown shown on the result page.

UploadDetailResponse.title: UploadDetailResponse
UploadDetailResponse.description:
Same as UploadResponse plus a preview of the extracted text and a list of
question sets generated from this upload.

UserStatsResponse.title: UserStatsResponse
UserStatsResponse.description: Aggregate stats surfaced on the dashboard hero + bento.
